title: Level 2 - Intermediate
description: Semantic retrieval, synonym matching, and basic multi-entity ambiguity.

cases.query: show payment details for invoice code 123

signals: invoice and payment should both be in scope
failure_classification_hints.investigation: Check whether the join path and invoice/payment column catalog are surfaced together.

cases.query: which campaigns are active right now

signals: campaign status should be a straightforward single-table filter
failure_classification_hints.investigation: Inspect the campaign schema group and the status filter prompt.

cases.query: which counsellor is assigned to the latest inquiries

signals: the assignment log is needed to link inquiry to employee
failure_classification_hints.investigation: Inspect the relation metadata and whether the planner retrieves assignment history before SQL generation.

cases.query: find the contact with email sample@example.com

signals: contact email lookup should not require joins
failure_classification_hints.investigation: Check column catalog retrieval for email and contact table synonyms.
